singine-request.lambda: λ(period, scenario, dimension, category) = preserve_causality(period) ∘ measure_baseline(period) ∘ apply_shock(period+1 mod cycle) ∘ momentum(post_shock - baseline)

scenario.label: Markdown pages by type
scenario.sql: SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name FROM entities e JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE e.entity_type = ? LIMIT 100
scenario.sparql: SELECT ?s ?label WHERE { ?s a markdown ; rdfs:label ?label . } LIMIT 100
scenario.graphql: { sparql(query:"SELECT ?s ?label WHERE { ?s a markdown ; rdfs:label ?label . } LIMIT 100") { rows } }

scenario.label: Kernel search across fragments
scenario.sql: SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 100
scenario.graphql: { search(text:"kernel", limit:100) { iri label source_name snippet } }

scenario.label: Session content search
scenario.sql: SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 100
scenario.graphql: { search(text:"session", limit:100) { iri label source_name snippet } }

scenario.label: TODO content search
scenario.sql: SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 100
scenario.graphql: { search(text:"TODO", limit:100) { iri label source_name snippet } }

scenario.label: System shock momentum after choc
scenario.sql: SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 100
scenario.graphql: { search(text:"session", limit:100) { iri label source_name snippet } }

scenario.label: Scenario file 00-Follow-the-Route-Planning-Buy-Fuel-Pre-Inflation.txt
scenario.sql: SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 50
scenario.graphql: { search(text:"00", limit:50) { iri label source_name snippet } }

scenario.label: Scenario file broader-links.rq
scenario.sql: SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 50
scenario.graphql: { search(text:"broader", limit:50) { iri label source_name snippet } }

scenario.sql: SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 50
scenario.graphql: { search(text:"human", limit:50) { iri label source_name snippet } }

scenario.sql: SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 50
scenario.graphql: { search(text:"list", limit:50) { iri label source_name snippet } }

scenario.sql: SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 50
scenario.graphql: { search(text:"related", limit:50) { iri label source_name snippet } }

scenario.sql: SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 50
scenario.graphql: { search(text:"risk", limit:50) { iri label source_name snippet } }

scenario.sql: SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 50
scenario.graphql: { search(text:"risk", limit:50) { iri label source_name snippet } }

scenario.sql: SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 50
scenario.graphql: { search(text:"risk", limit:50) { iri label source_name snippet } }
